square150x150logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 150 150'><rect fill='%23ff4d6d' width='150' height='150'/><text x='75' y='90' font-size='60' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>❤️</text></svg>

wide310x150logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 310 150'><rect fill='%23ff4d6d' width='310' height='150'/><text x='75' y='90' font-size='60' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>❤️</text></svg>

square310x310logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 310 310'><rect fill='%23ff4d6d' width='310' height='310'/><text x='155' y='160' font-size='100' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>❤️</text></svg>
